meaning: n.饱和(状态),浸润,浸透 饱和度
examples: The concept of saturation marketing makes perfect sense.
The market for computer games has reached saturation point.
Japanese car makers have been equally blind to the saturation of their markets at home and abroad.
Last year felt like a saturation bombing of accounting fiascos, from Enron to WorldCom to Adelphia and more.
India is seen as one of the few exceptions to the market saturation rule.
